title: E-commerce Storefront with Next.js
description: Complete route for building a production-ready e-commerce store: product catalog, image uploads, Stripe checkout, email receipts, error monitoring, and Vercel deployment.

steps.description: Initialize a new Next.js project with App Router and TypeScript
Set up Tailwind CSS v4 for styling
Add shadcn/ui component library for product cards, modals, and cart UI
Set up Prisma ORM with a Product, Order, and User schema
Add user authentication for customer accounts and order history
Add product image uploads to S3-compatible storage
Integrate Stripe Checkout for one-time product purchases
Send transactional order confirmation emails with Resend
Add error monitoring for checkout and payment flows
Set up CI pipeline to run tests on every push
Deploy the storefront to Vercel with production environment variables
